intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: {firstName} is a {location}-based {role}, with a passion for integrating digital tools into business processes. His work covers Web and mobile application design, automation, and website creation for small businesses.

achievements: Redesign of my portfolio website (v2) and ongoing development of a CRM
Welcoming an intern and rebranding a company in the wellness sector
2 websites in the wellness sector, one of which is for an association for the visually impaired
3 others in pest control and cleaning, one of which is an e-commerce site
Digitalization of a new company specializing in general electrical work and home automation
Promotion to team lead and onboarding of new hires
Handling client projects (direct contact and appointment scheduling)
Redesign and integration of WooCommerce for ProfilPlus Fabricant
Partnership request forms for Service Limo Car with Zoho
Automation of business processes for clients and internal use (Zapier and Zoho) :
Daily synchronization of a customer database across two CRMs
Sending emails with employee rankings based on call activity (API)
One site migration from CakePHP to Laravel
One application developed with React Native, Expo and Firebase: GMA Adequa
Three websites developed with Laravel: GMA Adequa, Rentor et Triber
Two websites developed with WordPress: Vizio et Hackers Corporation
Automation using JavaScript and PowerShell for IT asset warranty
Managing Active Directory accounts across the company's 8 sites
Configuring mailboxes, MS Exchange distribution lists and MS SharePoint sites
